acc-concept-required: You must first enter the concept of the entry.
accepts-emails-commas: Accepts multiple emails separated by commas
access-denied-p: You do not have permission to view this data. If you think you should have permission to view this data, contact your administrator for permission.
account-bad-parent: The account %codcuenta% has the wrong parent account associated with it.
account-length-error: Account length error. The account %code% must have the length defined in the exercise.
account-missing-in-balance: The account %codcuenta% has a balance but is not included in the balances. Consider including it if the balance is out of balance.
account-parent-error: The parent account is incorrect or does not belong to the exercise
accounting-entry-macros-text:
You can use special keywords (macros) to autocomplete some information on the description field:

Document name
Type %document% to add the document's name.
Current date
Type %date% to add the current date.
Entry date
Type %date-entry% to add the accounting entry's date.
Month
Type %month% to add the name of the month of the accounting entry's date.
accounting-entry-macros-title: Usage of macros in the description field
accounting-plan-must-have-at-least-2-lev: The accounting plan must have at least 2 levels: accounts and subaccounts.
accounting-possible-duplicated: Accounting entry possible duplicated of this other. If there isn't, to avoid this message, simply change the concept.
agent-commission-info: It will only apply to the selected agent
agent-dont-have-associated-supplier: The agent don't have an associated supplier
alias-general-info: Allows you to give a name to the value of the column on your left
allow-sale-without-stock-n: Allow out-of-stock sale on new products
api-disabled: API disabled. You can activate it from application preferences.
approve-document-same-date: Approve document on the same date
are-you-sure: This cannot be undone. Are you sure you wish to continue?
are-you-sure-action: This action needs confirmation. Are you sure you want to continue?
cant-assign-date-already-regularized: You can't assign the date %date% because there is already a regularization of %tax% for that period.
cant-assing-subaccount-supplier: Unable to associate subaccount for provider %supplierCode%
cant-associate-customer-subaccount: Unable to associate subaccount for client %customerCode%
cant-change-agent-in-settlement: Agent cannot be changed. The commission is already settled.
cant-convert-to-innodb: Unable to convert table '%tableName%' to InnoDB. Essential for FacturaScripts.
cant-create-subaccount-supplier: Unable to create the subaccount for the provider %supplierCode%
cant-delete-last-user: You can't delete the last user
cant-remove-invoice-refund: You cannot delete an invoice that already has a refund
changed-customer-to: Customer %oldCustomer% has been changed to customer %newCustomer%
changed-user-to: The user %oldUser% has been changed to the user %newUser%
click-link-to-add: You can add files from the library, in the administrator menu
closed-exercise-cant-change-date: Exercise %exerciseName% is closed. You can't change the date.
commission-general-info: List of commission percentages that are applied in the sale of products. The percentage with the most restrictive or specific conditions of those informed will be applied
company-commission-info: It will only apply to the selected company
control-panel-decimal-warning: Warning: this change will apply to product prices, but also to invoice totals, seats, etc.
copy-p: Fill in the form to make a copy of this model
country-not-in-eu: %codiso% does not belong to any country in the European Union
created-default-admin-account: The %nick% user was created with the %pass% password.
cron-timeout: The cron has stopped to prevent exceeding the maximum PHP execution time. Please run the cron from the terminal to avoid this limit.
csv-file-must-have-at-least-2-columns: The CSV must have at least 2 columns
customer-commission-info: It will only be applied when the sale is to the selected customer
customer-reached-maximum-risk: The customer has exceeded his maximum risk
dasboard-backup-li1: If you delete or uninstall FacturaScripts, you lose the data.
dasboard-backup-li2: If you delete or uninstall XAMPP, you lose the data.
dasboard-backup-li3: If you lose, format or destroy the PC, you lose the data.
dashboard-backup-p: We remind you that you have FacturaScripts installed on your PC, therefore the data (invoices, customers, etc...) are stored on your PC and only on your PC. Make regular backups and keep those copies away from your PC.
database-error-pc: 🖥️ If the program is installed on your PC, you probably forgot to activate MySQL or it has problems activating.
database-error-server: 🌎 If the program is installed on a server or hosting, you may have changed the user or password for the database, or you may have reached some usage limit of the hosting.
database-name-must-be-lowercase: The database name must be lowercase
date-of-the-document: Date of the document to be generated
dateentry-wildcard-info: Date indicated in the head of the accounting entry
db-type-not-recognized: Not recognized database type connection. Must be MySQL or PostgreSQL
default-to-company-email: By default to the company email
default-to-config-email: Default to the configured email address
default-to-user-email: By default to the user's email
delivery-note-email-text: Hello, I am attaching your %code% delivery note
desc-business-name-2: Fiscal or legally registered name of the client
desc-rate-code: Code for internal use of the rate.
desc-vat-document: Identifier of the document where the tax is applied
document-type-valid-length: Invalid document type. Must be between 1 and 20 characters.
document-wildcard-info: Document indicated in the head of the accounting entry
document-without-total: Document %document% without totals or with total at 0.
duplicate-customer-name-or-cif: A customer with the same name or VAT number exists
email-not-configured: Email not configured. You can configure the email from the administrator menu, email.
email-replies-to: Replies to this email will go to %email%
equivalent-account-not-found: Couldn't find equivalent account to %accountCode% in exercise %exerciseCode%. Have you imported the chart of accounts?
equivalent-subaccount-not-found: No subaccount equivalent to %subAccountCode% was found for copying.
error-no-name-in-settings: Error testing %viewName% view. No 'name' column in xml
error-processing-xmlview: Error processing XML View, file '%fileName%' not exist or is incorrect
es-operation-tax-ceuta-melilla: Operation subject to IPSI (Ceuta and Melilla)
es-operation-tax-other: Operation not subject to the above taxes
es-tax-exception-14: Spain: Not subject – Art. 14 VAT Law (customs regimes, bonded warehouses, free zones, transit operations)
es-tax-exception-20: Spain: Exempt (Art. 20 VAT Law) – Domestic exemptions (healthcare, education, insurance, banking…)
es-tax-exception-21: Spain: Exempt (Art. 21 VAT Law) – Exports to third countries
es-tax-exception-23-24: Spain: Exempt (Arts. 23–24 VAT Law) – Free zones and customs warehouses
es-tax-exception-25: Spain: Exempt - Art. 25 VAT Law – Intra-Community supplies
es-tax-exception-68-70: Spain: Not subject - Arts. 68–70 VAT Law (place-of-supply rules for goods and services, B2B to EU/abroad)
es-tax-exception-7: Spain: Not subject - Art. 7 VAT Law (contributions, transfer of UEA, samples, external self-consumption, etc.)
es-tax-exception-84: Spain: Taxable - Reverse charge (Art. 84 VAT Law) (construction, real estate, waste, non-exempt investment gold…)
es-tax-exception-n1: Spain: N1 Not subject (Art. 7, 14 and others)
es-tax-exception-other: Spain: Exempt - Other exemptions (investment gold, special schemes, international organizations, etc.)
es-tax-exception-other-not-subject: Spain: Not subject – Other non-subject cases (NATO, international conventions, EU armed forces…)
es-tax-regime-agrarian: Spain: Special regime for agriculture, livestock and fisheries
es-tax-regime-especial-agp: Special regime for agriculture, livestock and fisheries
es-tax-regime-gold: Spain: Special regime for investment gold
es-tax-regime-group-entities: Spain: Special regime for groups of entities
es-tax-regime-one-stop-shop-ioss: IOSS One Stop Shop tax regime
es-tax-regime-one-stop-shop-oss: OSS One Stop Shop tax regime
es-tax-regime-special-small-business: Special tax regime for small businesses
es-tax-regime-telecom: Special regimes applicable to telecommunications, radio broadcasting or television services and those provided electronically
es-tax-regime-travel: Spain: Special scheme for travel agents
es-tax-regime-used-goods: Spain: Special regime for used goods, art objects, antiques and collectibles
estimation-email-text: Hello, I am attaching your estimation %code%
exercise-without-accounting-plan: The exercise %exercise% does not yet have a chart of accounts
field-can-not-be-null: Field %fieldName% on table %tableName% can't be null
file-audio-codec-not-accepted: Error sending audio file %fileName% because its codec %codec% is not allowed. Allowed codecs are: %supported%
file-extension-not-accepted: Failed to send file %fileName% because its extension is not allowed. The allowed extensions are: %accepted%
file-size-error: Failed to send file %fileName% because it exceeds the maximum allowed size of %maxSize% MB
file-type-error: Error sending file of type%typeFile%. Supported types are: audio, document, image, and video.
finished-cron: Finished FacturaScripts cron execution, needed time: %timeNeeded%
folder-not-writable: You can not write to the FacturaScripts folder.
folders-not-writable: Cannot write to the FacturaScripts folders: %folders%
generate-document-desc: Add a line at the beginning of the document with the selected information
grid-help: Control + enter for line break. You can move or delete the lines by clicking on the line number.
group-more-docs-p: If you wish you can group together with other documents of this client / supplier
group-or-split-p: This wizard allows you to generate a new document from the lines of others. Select the quantities you want to use, the date of the new document and press the generate button.
help-server-accepts-filesize: This server support files up to %size% MB.
hint-create-accounting-entry: Create the accounting entry for the regularization of the taxes of the period
idem-wildcard-info: Copy the value of the previous line
incompatible-document: Incompatible document: %code%. Different customer, supplier, currency or warehouse
installer-p: Welcome to the FacturaScripts installer. Fill in the fields required to connect to the database.
installer-requirements: The follow extensions and functions are needed for FacturaScripts:
integrity-check-help: This is a check of system integrity, described as
invalid-admin-username: The administrator username is not valid: it must be between 3 and 50 characters, with no spaces.
invalid-alphanumeric-code: The alphanumeric code entered (%value%) is not valid. (%column%) must have between %min% and %max% numbers or letters, no spaces, accents or any other chraracter.
invalid-token-p: The access token for the file %file% is invalid or has expired
invalid-user-can-permission: Permiso no válido: %permission%. Los permisos disponibles son access, delete, export, import, update y only-owner-data.
invoice-email-text: Hello, I am attaching your invoice %code%
invoice-has-no-receipts: The invoice has no receipts. Create one from the receipts tab.
invoice-have-rectifying-cant-delete: The invoice already has a rectifying. Cann't be deleted.
invoice-new-assigned-date: There are invocies with bigger date (%oldDate%). New assigned date: %newDate%
invoice-regularized-cant-change-date: The invoice is within a regularization of %tax%. The date cann't be modified.
invoice-regularized-cant-delete: The invoice is within a regularization of %tax%. It cann't be deleted.
invoice-without-acc-entry: Invoice found without an accounting entry. Go to the invoices list and click the "Generate Entries" button.
ip-banned: For security reasons, access from your IP has been blocked for 10 minutes.
login-text: Type your user name and password to login
login-to-continue-p: You need to log in to continue with this action. Click sign in or create an account.
marked-as-homepage: Marked as homepage. Press again to uncheck.
max-input-vars-warning: With the current PHP configuration (max_input_vars) you will not be able to work with documents of more than %numlines% lines.
media-whatsapp-not-upload: Error uploading media file to the WhatsApp server: %file%
meta-description: FacturaScripts is a billing and accounting software for SMEs. It is free software under the GNU/LGPL license.
missing-data-epigraph-group: Missing data in the group epigraph.
missing-data-subaccount: Data is missing from the subaccount.
missing-epigraph-data: Data are missing from the epigraph.
missing-file-help: This file seems to be missing from your installation. Maybe you don't use it, but you can't remove it.
mysql-socket-p: This field is only required in some MySQL hostings.
name: Name
new-acc-entry-line-p: You can enter a line by typing the subaccount code below or by clicking the subaccounts button and selecting a subaccount.
new-invoice-line-p: Puede añadir un producto pulsando el botón producto o escribiendo su referencia o código de barras en el campo código de barras. O pulse el botón línea para una línea sin producto.
no-data-click-new: Press the New button to create the first record.
no-devices-detected-scan-usb: No devices detected. Please try scanning.
no-print-permission: You do not have permission to print or export
no-works-to-invoice: There are no jobs to invoice
not-allowed-delete: You do not have permission to delete
not-allowed-modify: You do not have permission to modify
not-passed-integrity-check:
Some files have not passed the integrity check...
You can get more details here.
not-valid-image: It is not a valid image
only-owner-data-p: By checking the option to show only user records, the user will only be able to see records that he or she has created or that are assigned to them (as a user or agent)
optional-or-product: Optional. If nothing is written, it will be used from the product.
order-email-text: Hello, I am attaching your order %code%
page-not-found-p: We have not found the page you are looking for.
page-option-info: Here you can modify the visible fields in this list or form
parent-group-cant-be-the-same-group: Parent group can't be the same group
php-extension-needed: The extension %extension% is required in the PHP configuration
php-extension-not-found: You don't have the %extension% PHP extension installed.
php-support-end: Support for PHP %current% will end soon. Please update PHP to version %min% or higher.
php-version-too-new: It is recommended to use a PHP version between %min_version% and %max_version%. You currently have %version%.
plugin-file-too-big: This server does not allow uploading files larger than %size% MB. Please increase the maximum upload file size in PHP or copy the file to the Plugins folder.
plugin-folder-not-equal-name: The plugin folder (%folderName%) does not have the same name as the plugin (%pluginName%)
plugin-installation-disabled: Plugin installation is disabled on this server
plugin-need-update: The plugin %plugin% will need an update to work with the new version of FacturaScripts.
plugin-need-update-but: The plugin %plugin% does not have a supported update yet.
plugin-needs-fs-version: The plugin %pluginName% needs FacturaScripts %minVersion% but you have FacturaScripts %version%
plugin-not-compatible: The plugin %pluginName% is not compatible with FacturaScripts %version%
plugin-phpversion-error: The plugin %pluginName% requires PHP %php% or higher
plugin-removal-disabled: Plugin removal is disabled on this server
plugin-unsupported-version: The plugin %pluginName% is for FacturaScripts 2017 or lower, but you are using FacturaScripts %version%.
plugins-p: Plugins allow adding new features. Add the ones you need now, or do it whenever you want from the admin menu.
pvpsindto-line-error: Error in the value of pvpsindto of line %reference% of the document. Correct value: %totalWithoutDiscount%
pvptotal-line-error: Error in pvptotal value of line %reference% of document. Correct value: %total%
record-save-error: An error occurred while saving the record
rectified-invoice-p: Invoices are commercial documents and have a number of legal restrictions. They cannot be deleted or modified, only total or partial returns are allowed. Use this form to make a return of this invoice.
register-install-ad-p: Get one month of PRO sponsorship by registering your FacturaScripts installation (only the first time). You will be able to download one of the exclusive plugins for sponsors (see the list of sponsor plugins).
register-installation-p: Register your installation to be able to update paid or private plugins.
registered-installation-p: This installation has already been registered. If you have payment plugins, press the manage button to link them and be able to update.
report-taxes-p: This report allows you to obtain the tax breakdown from purchase or sale invoices in the selected range
search-document: Type the number of %doctype% to search.
search-in-all-pages: Search across all pages of the program
select-file-to-add: You can add a file here: select it and upload it from your computer. Click the 'None' button to select no file.
sketch-invoice-warning: This invoice is still a draft. Make it official by changing its status to issued.
soap-extension-not-installed: The SOAP extension is not enabled in PHP. Contact your hosting provider to activate it.
status-name-valid-length: Invalid status name. Must be between 1 and 20 characteres.
status-value-is-number: The field state must be a number.
subaccount-bad-codcuenta: The subaccount %codsubcuenta% has an incorrect account assigned.
subaccount-belongs-other-year: Sub-account %subAccountCode% belongs to another financial year.
subaccount-pyg-not-found: Profit and loss subaccount not found
subject: Subject
sum-netos-line-tax-must-be: The sum of the net of the VAT lines should be: %lineNet%
sum-total-line-tax-must-be: The sum of the VAT totals of the VAT lines should be: %lineTotalTax%
supplier-have-no-iban: The supplier %%supplier has no IBAN (bank account)
telemetry-data-to-send: Registered installations periodically notify the version of FacturaScripts, PHP, country, language and list of plugins.
test-mail-not-implemented: Mail handler test is not implemented
test-sendmail-not-implemented: Sendmail mail handler test not implemented
title: Title
total-value-error: Total amount of %docType% %docCode% incorrect (%docTotal%). Correct amount: %calcTotal%
totalirpf-value-error: Total PIT amount of %docType% %docCode% incorrect (%docTotalIRPF%). Correct amount: %calcTotalIRPF%
totaliva-value-error: Total tax amount of %docType% %docCode% incorrect (%docTotalTax%). Correct amount: %calcTotalTax%
totallinea-value-error: Error in the totallinea value of the VAT line of the tax %taxCode% of the invoice. Correct value: %totalLine%
totp-secret-key-not-set: User %nick% does not have a TOTP secret key configured
two-factor-auth-p: Set up the Google Authenticator app using the QR code, enter the code here, and click verify to complete the activation process.
unsafe-file-p: For security reasons, we prevent downloads of certain file types, such as this one: %file%.
updates-available-p: There are updates available for FacturaScripts. Please click on the updater and download the new version. Updates fix bugs and add new features.
updates-beta-warning-p: ⚠️ Beta updates are enabled. These updates have not been tested and are only recommended for test installations.
validate-whatsapp-not-connection: Error validating WhatsApp number; could not establish connection to the WhatsApp server.
vat-number-not-valid: VAT number %vat-number% is not registered in VIES.
vat-number-not-vies: Number '%vat-number%' is not registered in VIES system
vies-check-success: Number '%vat-number%' is registered in VIES system
warehouse-cant-be-same: The origin and destination warehouse can not be the same.
warehouse-must-be-same-business: Warehouses must be from the same company
weak-password: The password must be at least 8 characters long, including numbers and letters.
wildcard-general-info: It will be replaced by the corresponding value
wizard-plugins: A plugin adds functionality. Select the plugins you want to activate immediately, or you can do it later from the control panel.
you-can-sort-images: You can sort the images by dragging them.
zip-error-wrong-structure: The zip structure is incorrect. It must contain the plugin folder and only one plugin.
